debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
⊢ ∀ (φ ψ : Formula ℕ),
    φ ➝ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T →
      φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT →
        ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

failed_attempts:
intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have h1 : φ ➝ ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp)) hφψ)
  have h2 : (φ ➝ ψ) ⋏ φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := construction_omega_andClosed h1 hφ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp)) h2

intros φ ψ hφψ hφ
  apply construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp $ Deduction.imp_intro $ Deduction.mp (Deduction.and_elim_l $ Deduction.ctx $ by simp) (Deduction.and_elim_r $ Deduction.ctx $ by simp))
  exact construction_omega_andClosed (mem_omega_of_mem $ T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp $ Deduction.axiomK _ _) hφψ) hφ

intros φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  obtain ⟨hψ0, Γ, hΓ, hξ⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega hψ
  obtain hφ0 | hφ1 := of_mem_construction_omega hφ
  . exact hψ0 (T.mem_trans hφ0 hφψ)
  . have hξ' : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans (T.imp_closed (by
      apply Logic.iff_provable.mp; grind
    ) hφψ) hξ
    have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := by
      apply not_of_mem_construction_omega (encode φ) (Γ := Γ)
      . apply monotone_construction (by sorry)

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  apply construction_omega_impClosed (φ := (φ ➝ ψ) ⋏ φ)
  . exact axiomI andProjL andProjR
  . apply construction_omega_andClosed
    . apply mem_omega_of_mem

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ;
  apply construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp))
  apply construction_omega_andClosed hφ
  apply mem_omega_of_mem
  apply T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp)) hφψ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have : T.theory ⊆ construction_omega T hT := fun _ h =>
    mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp)) h)
  apply construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp))
  apply construction_omega_andClosed hφ (this hφψ)

intros φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have h1 : φ ➝ ψ ∈ U := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp)) hφψ)
  have h2 : φ ⋏ (φ ➝ ψ) ∈ U := construction_omega_andClosed hφ h1
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp)) h2

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have h1 : φ ➝ ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp $ by simp) hφψ)
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp $ by simp) (construction_omega_andClosed hφ h1)

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have h1 : φ ➝ ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by grind)) hφψ)
  have h2 : φ ⋏ (φ ➝ ψ) ∈ construction_omega T hT := construction_omega_andClosed hφ h1
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by grind)) h2

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have : φ ➝ ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp)) hφψ)
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp)) (construction_omega_andClosed hφ this)

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have h1 : (φ ➝ ψ) ∈ U := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by grind)) hφψ)
  have h2 : (φ ➝ ψ) ⋏ φ ∈ U := construction_omega_andClosed h1 hφ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by grind)) h2

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have : φ ➝ ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (by simp) hφψ)
  have : (φ ➝ ψ) ⋏ φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := construction_omega_andClosed this hφ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (by simp) this

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ;
  apply construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp))

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hUT : T.theory ⊆ U := fun _ h => mem_omega_of_mem (T.imp_closed (af (φ := _)) h)
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by simp)) (construction_omega_andClosed hφ (hUT hφψ))
